commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Slack prepare/dispatch threading so `replyToMode: "off"` clears accidental top-level reply thread targets while preserving existing Slack thread and assistant DM thread targets, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +80. Total +90 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main and v2026.5.27 can prepare assistant context as `forcedReplyThreadTs`, and dispatch treats that forced target as a thread even when reply mode is off. I did not run a live Slack repro during this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer should decide whether the Slack reply-target compatibility risk and remaining live proof gap are acceptable; no narrow automated repair is evident.
